entries.title: Complete assigned models, focusing on craftsmanship. 3rd-Year Models include various cones and cylinders.

entries.content:
Grade 4 students who are new to sloyd should begin with Sloyd: Level 1 and then continue courses in sequence.

Prerequisite: Sloyd: Level 2
